heroDescription: Your privacy matters to us. Learn how Bitumpro collects, uses, and protects personal information submitted through our website.
overviewDescription: Bitumpro is committed to handling personal information responsibly and transparently. This policy explains what information we may collect, how we use it, and the measures we take to protect it.
informationCollectionDescription: We may collect information that you provide directly or that is generated when you use our website:
personalInformation: Contact information such as name, email address, phone number, company name, and inquiry details
usageData: Website usage data, including pages visited, browser type, device information, and general analytics
cookiesData: Cookies and similar technologies used to improve website functionality and understand user interactions
communicationData: Messages, quote requests, product inquiries, and other communications submitted through our contact forms
dataUsageDescription: We use collected information for business and website-related purposes, including:
serviceProvision: Responding to inquiries, quote requests, product information requests, and technical support needs
communication: Communicating with you about Bitumpro products, services, partnerships, and project requirements
improvement: Improving our website, user experience, content, and service quality
legalCompliance: Meeting applicable legal, regulatory, security, and business record obligations
dataProtectionDescription: We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal information from unauthorized access, loss, misuse, or disclosure.
encryptionDescription: We use appropriate security measures to help protect information transmitted through our website.
accessControlDescription: Access to personal information is limited to authorized personnel or service providers who need it for legitimate business purposes.
yourRightsDescription: Depending on applicable privacy laws, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information:
rightAccess: Right to request access to the personal information we hold about you
rightCorrection: Right to request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information
rightDeletion: Right to request deletion of your personal information, subject to legal and business requirements
rightObjection: Right to object to or restrict certain types of data processing where applicable
contactDescription: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how Bitumpro handles personal information, please contact us.
